home.why_sub: We're committed to delivering results that speak louder than promises.
home.why1_desc: Deadlines are sacred. We deliver every project on time — without ever cutting corners on quality.
home.why2_desc: Every deliverable goes through a rigorous quality check. Our professionals set the bar, then raise it.
home.why3_desc: Your work, your data, your ideas — completely protected. We never share, sell, or expose anything.

about.hero_sub: From startups to students — CyberX is your all-in-one partner for software, design, documentation, and professional education.
about.story_p1: CyberX was founded on a simple belief: that great digital work should be accessible to everyone — startups, students, and established businesses alike. We started as a small team of developers and designers who were tired of seeing talented people held back by the high cost of quality.
about.story_p2: Today, we operate across software development, UI/UX design, technical documentation, and professional education. Every project we take on is treated with the same care — whether it's a one-page website or a full enterprise system. We don't have a minimum budget. We have a minimum standard.
about.value1_desc: We strive for perfection in every project, delivering work that consistently exceeds expectations.
about.value2_desc: Radical honesty and full transparency are at the heart of every client relationship we build.
about.value3_desc: We embrace emerging technology and creative thinking to solve problems in ways that surprise and delight.
about.value4_desc: Your success is the only metric that matters. We listen deeply, adapt quickly, and deliver precisely.
about.timeline_2020_desc: A small team of developers and designers, tired of seeing great ideas fail due to the high cost of quality work.
about.timeline_2021_desc: Zero compromises. Every project delivered on time, every client dealt with directly — no middlemen.
about.timeline_2022_desc: Grew beyond development to offer UI/UX design and technical documentation under one roof.
about.timeline_2023_desc: Launched our education arm — bringing professional-grade learning to students who couldn't access it elsewhere.
about.timeline_2025_desc: Still the same rule: we don't have a minimum budget. We have a minimum standard.
about.timeline_2026_desc: Expanded across 9 countries — more clients, same uncompromising standard.
about.testi_sub: Real words from real clients who trusted us with their projects and never looked back.
about.testi1_quote: CyberX completely transformed the way our business presents itself online. From the branding to the website to the documentation — it was all done with incredible attention to detail and speed we had never experienced before. It felt like working with a team of 20, not a boutique agency.
about.testi2_quote: The academic support I got from CyberX Academy was exceptional. My grades improved dramatically and I finally understood concepts that had confused me for years.
about.testi3_quote: Delivered our entire software project ahead of schedule. The quality was remarkable and the team were always just a WhatsApp message away.
about.testi4_quote: My CV and portfolio were redesigned in 48 hours. I landed 3 interviews in the first week of applying.
about.testi5_quote: The brand identity package we received was world-class. Our competitors noticed the difference immediately.
about.partners_sub:
We don't just build — we grow together.
Every partner we work with is a relationship we invest in, not just a project we deliver
